prompt: Design and scaffold a Claude Code sub-agent for automated security auditing.
Create a new sub-agent file with YAML frontmatter, tools, permissions, and a system prompt.
Follow the create-sub-agent workflow to generate an agent .md file with escalation posture and lifecycle hooks.
Scaffold an advanced stateful skill with L4 state management patterns.
Create a simple skill using the create-skill scaffolder.
Add a Python package dependency to requirements.in.
